04. The Department should provide the number of women beneficiaries belonging to Scheduled Castes and neo-Buddhist categories.
The department will be responsible for spending for the purpose for which the funds are sought.
The Department provides benefits of the scheme to women beneficiaries belonging to the Scheduled Castes category.
The certificate will need to be submitted when seeking further funding. Scheduled Castes and Neo-Buddhists
The funds provided under the category component programme will be utilised for SCs and neo-Buddhists.
The department should ensure that it is for the category beneficiary only. Beneficiaries who are currently registered
Women and Child Development is responsible for ensuring that women are screened and given benefits to eligible beneficiary women.
The Department will have Sajai Gandhi Niradhar Grants Scheme and Shravan Bal of the Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance.
Under the Seva Rajya Pension Yojana, eligible beneficiary women in the state are given the title of "Chief Minister My Dear Sister."
The Department of Women and Child Development should take care that there is no second round of financial assistance through the scheme.
05. The Head of the Department and the Controller while spending the funds distributed under the said Government Decision.
